title: Executive (Exam Unit - Higher Educations) - Central - WCDT
description:
Examination Operations

  • Manage confidential student and examination data in the student and learning management systems.

  • Coordinate end-to-end examination operations for quizzes, class tests, and exams (onsite and online).

Pre-Assessment Preparation

  • Liaise with lecturers and module leaders on exam paper preparation and pre-moderation.

  • Plan examination resources, including venue booking and invigilator deployment.

  • Prepare and update examination schedules accurately.

  • Prepare assessment materials for onsite and online examinations.

  • Brief invigilators to ensure smooth assessment operations.

Examination Day Operations

  • Manage onsite and online examinations to ensure smooth execution.

  • Work with invigilators to ensure compliance with examination procedures.

  • Handle examination issues and academic misconduct cases when required.

Post-Assessment Processing

  • Coordinate post-assessment activities, including marking timelines and post-moderation.

  • Liaise with academic staff on moderation and results finalisation.

  • Update students’ graduation status in the student management system and at Examination & Awards Boards.

Examination Board Management

  • Support University Examination Board meetings, including pre- and post-moderation coordination with university partners.

  • Prepare documentation and provide administrative support for board meetings.

Programme & Administrative Support

  • Support examination operations for new programmes, including planning first assessments.

  • Liaise with internal and external stakeholders to align assessment processes and timelines.

  • Draft and document examination workflows for new programmes.

  • Process exam-related procurement and finance matters according to timelines.

Stakeholder & Vendor Coordination

  • Work closely with school operations and academic teams on examination matters.

  • Coordinate with outsourced partners to monitor and track examination processes.

  • Manage the assignment and deployment of invigilators for onsite and online exams.

Others

  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Reporting Officer from time to time.


    Wecruit Pte Ltd | 20C0270
    Tew Jie Wei | R22106822

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
